collaborations.desc: Joint cultural evenings bringing together East Asian communities — K-pop meets J-pop in unforgettable socials.
Co-hosting anime screenings, cosplay nights, and conventions where fandoms collide.
Cultural education partner providing resources, guest speakers, and support for our Japanese language initiatives.
Supporting international students from Japan transitioning into life at UNSW through our liaison program.
Partnering with Sydney's Japanese restaurant and business community for authentic cultural and culinary events.
Exclusive discounts and group travel arrangements for members heading to Japan.
Academic partnerships supporting Japanese language learners with workshops and tutoring connections.
